title: The West Built the Cheap China System Evidence Pack
research_question: Can the TWIS article claim that Western capitalism helped build the cheap China production system and that later efforts to restrict or reprice cheap direct buying risk making poorer consumers pay more?
scope: Controlled TWIS article/sandbox pack using one article-draft source and one external Reuters source. This pack tests whether Evidence Pack v1 can hold a second small article proof trail with an added external source. It is not a full publication evidence pack.
notes: Second controlled TWIS article/sandbox Evidence Pack. It uses one article-draft source and one Reuters source. The Reuters source supports the specific EU low-value parcel duty point only. External evidence for historic outsourcing, corporate motive, wider tariff effects, and consumer-price impact is still needed before publication use.
